title: Finnish-Inspired Professional Development and Institutional Training Curriculum
ethical_positioning: Independent Finnish-inspired CPD. Avoid claims of official Finnish accreditation unless a formal Finnish partner, awarding body or accreditation agreement is secured.
global_outcomes: Translate Finnish-inspired education values into observable classroom and leadership behaviours.
Plan lessons with Support, Core and Extension Routes so mixed-ability learners can access the same learning goal.
Use evidence, formative assessment and self-evaluation to improve daily practice.
Adapt non-Finnish coursebooks and subject units to a Finnish-inspired planning ethos without losing subject integrity.
Implement SISU-style play-based early years routines for teachers and parents.
Build a blended CPD platform with videos, tasks, portfolio evidence, reflection and safe certificate rules.
source_basis: Finnish National Agency for Education core curriculum materials
Finnish Education Evaluation Centre enhancement-led evaluation
OECD teaching and curriculum autonomy research
